_placeholder_notice: PLACEHOLDER STARTER TAGS — designer owns the real narrative taxonomy. See Development-Plan/PLACEHOLDER_LEDGER.md §5 for the furnishing list. WNS agent seeded these thread-stage / tone / relationship categories so the pipeline compiles; all values are subject to replacement.

_meta.purpose: Narrative tag taxonomy for WNS (NL1-NL7). Mirrors the WMS tag-definitions pattern but scoped to narrative content. Separate file from WMS tag-definitions.JSON per CC5 (sibling system).
_meta.address_tag_prefixes_note: Narrative address prefixes (thread:, arc:, witness:) are facts, never LLM-writable. See §4.2b of WORLD_SYSTEM_WORKING_DOC.md.

thread_stage.description: Where in its arc a thread fragment sits. Placeholder vocabulary.

tone.description: Narrative mood of the fragment. Placeholder vocabulary.

relationship.description: Inter-actor/faction relationship framed by the fragment. Placeholder vocabulary.

narrative_domain.description: What kind of story this fragment contributes to. Placeholder vocabulary.

emergent_entity.description: Dynamic (free-form) names surfaced by weaving — factions, places, persons the LLM leans on.
